title: 98th Paratroopers Division

infobox.value: * [1982 Lebanon War](/wiki/1982_Lebanon_War "1982 Lebanon War") * [2006 Lebanon War](/wiki/2006_Lebanon_War "2006 Lebanon War") * [2014 Gaza War](/wiki/2014_Gaza_War "2014 Gaza War") * [Gaza war](/wiki/Gaza_war "Gaza war") * [Israel–Hezbollah conflict](/wiki/Israel%E2%80%93Hezbollah_conflict_(2023%E2%80%93present) "Israel–Hezbollah conflict (2023–present)")[[1]](#cite_note-1) * [2024 Israeli invasion of Lebanon](/wiki/2024_Israeli_invasion_of_Lebanon "2024 Israeli invasion of Lebanon")
[Dan Goldfuss](/wiki/Dan_Goldfuss "Dan Goldfuss") [Dan Shomron](/wiki/Dan_Shomron "Dan Shomron") [Tal Russo](/wiki/Tal_Russo "Tal Russo") [Aviv Kochavi](/wiki/Aviv_Kochavi "Aviv Kochavi")

([Hebrew](/wiki/Hebrew_language "Hebrew language"): עֻצְבַּת הָאֵשׁ, *Utzbat HaEsh,* lit. The Fire Formation), is an elite division of the [Israel Defense Forces](/wiki/Israel_Defense_Forces "Israel Defense Forces"). It is subordinate to the [Central Command](/wiki/Central_Command_(Israel) "Central Command (Israel)"). In October 2024 it took part in a [ground operation in Lebanon](/w/index.php?title=2024_Israeli_invasion_in_Lebanon&action=edit&redlink=1 "2024 Israeli invasion in Lebanon (page does not exist)").[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)

["Gallant says Israel's focus has moved to northern front as 'new phase' of war begins"](https://www.timesofisrael.com/liveblog_entry/gallant-says-israels-focus-has-moved-to-northern-front-as-new-phase-of-war-begins/). *The Times of Israel*. 18 September 2024. Retrieved 18 September 2024.

["Amid heightened tensions with Hezbollah, IDF deploys 98th Division to northern Israel"](https://www.timesofisrael.com/liveblog_entry/amid-heightened-tensions-with-hezbollah-idf-deploys-98th-division-to-northern-israel/). *[The Times of Israel](/wiki/The_Times_of_Israel "The Times of Israel")*.
["IDF's 98th Division being redeployed from Gaza to the north"](https://www.jns.org/idfs-98th-division-being-redeployed-from-gaza-to-the-north/). 18 September 2024.

Military unit

The **98th Division "HaEsh"** ([Hebrew](/wiki/Hebrew_language "Hebrew language"): עֻצְבַּת הָאֵשׁ, *Utzbat HaEsh,* lit. The Fire Formation), is an elite division of the [Israel Defense Forces](/wiki/Israel_Defense_Forces "Israel Defense Forces"). It is subordinate to the [Central Command](/wiki/Central_Command_(Israel) "Central Command (Israel)"). In October 2024 it took part in a [ground operation in Lebanon](/w/index.php?title=2024_Israeli_invasion_in_Lebanon&action=edit&redlink=1 "2024 Israeli invasion in Lebanon (page does not exist)").[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)
